name: Hag Eye
description:
A Hag Eye has 3 charges. While wearing or holding this item, you can expend 1 charge to cast {@spell Darkvision|XPHB} (targeting yourself only) or {@spell See Invisibility|XPHB}. The Hag Eye regains all expended charges daily at dawn.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Coven Sensor", "entries": ["The Hag Eye is usually entrusted to a hag's minion for safekeeping and transport. As a {@action Magic|XPHB} action, a hag who belongs to the coven that created the Hag Eye can see what the Hag Eye sees if the
